screenerPage.description: Institutional-grade analysis for Indonesian stocks powered by composite scoring algorithms.

upgrade.success: ✅ Payment successful! Your account has been upgraded to Premium. Please refresh if features are still locked.
upgrade.pending: ⏳ Payment is pending. We'll activate your account once it's confirmed (usually within a few minutes).
upgrade.errorStatus: ❌ Payment failed or was cancelled. Please try again.
upgrade.title: Unlock Premium access
upgrade.subtitle: Get full access to all governance analytics features for IDX-listed securities.
upgrade.priceNote: Rp 15.000 plan + Rp 2.000 admin · per month

errors.script: Payment script not loaded. Please refresh and try again.

features: Risk Map — Interactive scatter plot of HHI vs free float for every stock
HHI distribution — Ownership concentration analysis across all tiers
Governance flags — Filter stocks by specific risk flags (LowFloat, Insider, etc.)
Full screener — Unlimited access to all stocks in the sortable table
Owners tab — See all institutional owners and their full portfolios
Stats tab — Advanced aggregated statistics and cross-stock analytics

errors.notFoundBody: This page does not exist or has been moved.
errors.boundaryBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or return to the dashboard.
